---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the situation where you would want this feature. Concrete user
story preferred over abstract description.

## What you have in mind

Sketch the API / config / CLI surface you would want.

## Have you looked at

- [ ] Existing subcommands in `docs/usage_guide.md`
- [ ] Existing config knobs in `.env.example` and `config/*.example.yaml`
- [ ] Existing dashboard panels
- [ ] The [Out of scope](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#scope) section
  of `CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Are you willing to contribute

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR.
- [ ] Yes, with guidance.
- [ ] No, just filing the idea.
